title: How to Split a Large SQL File on macOS
description: macOS has built‑in tools, but SQL dumps need structure‑aware splitting. Here’s the right way.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: Large SQL dumps can’t be split with simple `split` commands if you want valid imports.
Use a splitter that keeps CREATE TABLE statements and multi‑line INSERTs intact.
See also: **How to Import Large SQL Files in cPanel**.

content.title: Split on macOS safely
content.text: Break large dumps without breaking SQL.

faq.question: Is the macOS `split` command safe?
faq.answer: No. It splits by bytes and can cut statements in half.
